description: Style NoteNow give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of tan brown slippers from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product DetailsTan brown slippers with thick connecting forefoot and midfoot straps that have stitched detailing and metal embellishments on itSmooth footbedOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with patterned grooves and pivot point on the forefoot Material and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
